title: Universal Home Non-slip Flexible Cutting Mat Food Contact Dishwasher Safe - Pink
description:
Cut your favorite meats, seafood and produce without the mess with the Universal Home Flexible Cutting Mat! This cutting mat is easy to clean - simply wash it with soap and water, or place it in the top rack of your dishwasher. Manufactured in compliance with all applicable FDA regulations, this mat is guaranteed food contact safe. It's also lightweight and flexible, and will not dull your knives. Universal Home cutting mats are stain and odor resistant, and are constructed of duable polypropylene. Each mat measures 13.25" x 9.5", and will fit on most kitchen surfaces. This is a must-have cutting board for any kitchen!
